name: Master Program in Machine Learning Algorithms using Python
description: 45-Hour Master Program in Machine Learning Algorithms using Python. Hands-on projects, 100% job assistance, global certificates.

name: Data Science & Machine Learning Courses Directory

mainEntity.name: What is the duration of the course?

acceptedAnswer.text: The Master Program in Machine Learning Algorithms using Python Programming is a comprehensive 45-hour course. The training is structured across 7 modules with a mix of lectures, hands-on projects, and assessments.

mainEntity.name: Do I need prior programming experience?

acceptedAnswer.text: Basic understanding of Python programming concepts is recommended to ensure you can keep up with the pace of the ML algorithms and implementation modules. However, we include foundational modules to help you catch up if needed.

mainEntity.name: What topics are covered in the curriculum?

acceptedAnswer.text: The curriculum covers 7 comprehensive modules: Introduction to Python & ML Foundations, Data Preprocessing, Supervised Learning (Regression), Supervised Learning (Classification), Model Evaluation & Validation, Unsupervised Learning, and Capstone Projects with real-world applications.

CDPL offers a Hybrid (CLASSROOM + ONLINE) training pattern. Students can attend live sessions in the classroom or online. All sessions are live streamed, and recordings are provided for flexibility and asynchronous learning.

Yes, absolutely! We offer a hybrid learning model where you can attend live sessions either in-classroom or online. All sessions are live streamed, and recordings are available for students who cannot attend live.

You will receive an internationally recognized certificate from Cinute Digital, validated with a unique authorization QR code. The certificate is issued upon completion of all assessments and mock interview processes.
Yes, our certificate is globally recognized and validated with a unique QR code. It's accepted by leading companies worldwide and adds significant value to your professional profile.

mainEntity.name: Do you provide job placement assistance?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes, we provide 100% job assistance including resume optimization, LinkedIn profile building, interview preparation, and direct connections with top employers. Our placement team works with you from Day 1.

mainEntity.name: What is the average salary after the course?

acceptedAnswer.text: Freshers typically start with an average salary of 9 LPA as ML Engineers. With experience and specialization, salaries can range from 10-18 LPA depending on the role, company, and location.

mainEntity.name: What if I face technical issues during the course?

acceptedAnswer.text: We have a dedicated support team available to help with technical issues. You can reach out through email, phone, or our support portal. We also provide 1:1 doubt-solving sessions to clarify any technical concepts.
You'll need a computer with Python 3.8+, Jupyter Notebook, and libraries like NumPy, Pandas, Scikit-learn, and TensorFlow installed. We provide detailed setup guides and support for installation.

mainEntity.name: How do I enroll in the course?

acceptedAnswer.text: You can enroll through our website by filling out the enrollment form. You'll need to provide your basic information, and our team will contact you with batch details, pricing, and next steps.
